b1FindChat.script: (function(){var sels='[class*="chat"],[class*="message"],[id*="chat"],[id*="message"],[role="textbox"],[contenteditable="true"],textarea,input[type="text"]';var els=document.querySelectorAll(sels);var count=0;els.forEach(function(el){var tag=el.tagName.toLowerCase();if(tag==='input'||tag==='textarea'||el.getAttribute('contenteditable')==='true'||el.getAttribute('role')==='textbox'){el.style.outline='3px solid #ff3b30';el.style.outlineOffset='2px';count++;}});if(count===0){var all=document.querySelectorAll('[class*="chat"],[class*="message"],[id*="chat"],[id*="message"]');all.forEach(function(el){el.style.outline='2px solid #ff9f0a';el.style.outlineOffset='1px';});count=all.length;}if(count===0)alert('No chat elements found on this page.');})();

b1ToggleStats.script: (function(){var id='__ub_stats1__';var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el){if(window.__ub_t1__)clearInterval(window.__ub_t1__);delete window.__ub_t1__;el.remove();return;}var ov=document.createElement('div');ov.id=id;ov.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:2147483647;background:rgba(20,20,20,0.95);color:#fff;font-family:-apple-system,Helvetica,sans-serif;font-size:13px;padding:10px 12px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);';var tdsp=document.createElement('span');tdsp.style.cssText='font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;min-width:72px;font-size:14px;font-family:monospace;';tdsp.textContent='00:00:00';var sec=0;window.__ub_t1__=setInterval(function(){sec++;var h=Math.floor(sec/3600),m=Math.floor(sec%3600/60),s=sec%60;tdsp.textContent=[h,m,s].map(function(n){return String(n).padStart(2,'0');}).join(':');},1000);var rst=document.createElement('button');rst.textContent='Reset';rst.onclick=function(){sec=0;tdsp.textContent='00:00:00';};rst.style.cssText='padding:3px 8px;background:#48484a;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;';var chatEls=document.querySelectorAll('[class*="message"],[class*="chat"],[role="listitem"],[data-message-id],[class*="msg"]');var chatSp=document.createElement('span');chatSp.style.cssText='color:#98e8a0;font-size:12px;white-space:nowrap;';if(chatEls.length>0)chatSp.textContent='\ud83d\udcac '+chatEls.length+' msgs';var sinp=document.createElement('input');sinp.type='text';sinp.placeholder='Search\u2026';sinp.style.cssText='flex:1;min-width:80px;padding:3px 8px;background:#3a3a3c;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;';var matches=[],midx=-1;function hl(){matches.forEach(function(m){try{m.style.outline='';m.style.backgroundColor='';}catch(e){}});matches=[];midx=-1;var q=sinp.value.trim();if(!q)return;var tw=document.createTreeWalker(document.body,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT);var nd;while(nd=tw.nextNode()){if(nd.nodeValue&&nd.nodeValue.toLowerCase().includes(q.toLowerCase())&&nd.parentElement){nd.parentElement.style.outline='2px solid #ffd60a';nd.parentElement.style.backgroundColor='rgba(255,214,10,0.2)';matches.push(nd.parentElement);}}if(matches.length)matches[0].scrollIntoView({block:'center',behavior:'smooth'});}sinp.addEventListener('input',hl);var upb=document.createElement('button');upb.textContent='\u2191';upb.onclick=function(){if(!matches.length)return;midx=(midx-1+matches.length)%matches.length;matches[midx].scrollIntoView({block:'center',behavior:'smooth'});};upb.style.cssText='padding:3px 8px;background:#48484a;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;';var dnb=document.createElement('button');dnb.textContent='\u2193';dnb.onclick=function(){if(!matches.length)return;midx=(midx+1)%matches.length;matches[midx].scrollIntoView({block:'center',behavior:'smooth'});};dnb.style.cssText=upb.style.cssText;ov.appendChild(tdsp);ov.appendChild(rst);if(chatEls.length>0)ov.appendChild(chatSp);ov.appendChild(sinp);ov.appendChild(upb);ov.appendChild(dnb);document.documentElement.appendChild(ov);})();

b2ImagesOnly.script: (function(){var id='__ub_imgonly2__';var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el){el.remove();return;}var imgs=Array.prototype.slice.call(document.images).filter(function(i){return i.src&&/^https?:/.test(i.src);});var ov=document.createElement('div');ov.id=id;ov.style.cssText='position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:2147483647;background:#111;overflow:auto;padding:16px;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;';var cls=document.createElement('button');cls.textContent='\u2715 Close';cls.onclick=function(){ov.remove();};cls.style.cssText='display:block;margin-bottom:12px;padding:8px 16px;background:#3a3a3c;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;';ov.appendChild(cls);var h=document.createElement('p');h.textContent=imgs.length+' image'+(imgs.length!==1?'s':'')+' found';h.style.cssText='color:#8e8e93;font-family:sans-serif;font-size:13px;margin:0 0 12px;';ov.appendChild(h);if(imgs.length===0){var p=document.createElement('p');p.textContent='No images found on this page.';p.style.cssText='color:#fff;font-family:sans-serif;font-size:16px;';ov.appendChild(p);}else{imgs.forEach(function(img){var i=document.createElement('img');i.src=img.src;i.style.cssText='display:block;max-width:100%;margin-bottom:12px;border-radius:8px;';ov.appendChild(i);});}document.documentElement.appendChild(ov);})();

b2ImageLinks.script: (function(){var id='__ub_imglinks2__';var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el){el.remove();return;}var srcs=Array.prototype.map.call(document.images,function(i){return i.src;}).filter(Boolean);var ov=document.createElement('div');ov.id=id;ov.style.cssText='position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:2147483647;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.92);color:#fff;font-family:-apple-system,sans-serif;overflow:auto;padding:16px;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;';var btn=document.createElement('button');btn.textContent='\u2715 Close';btn.onclick=function(){ov.remove();};btn.style.cssText='display:block;margin-bottom:12px;padding:8px 16px;background:#3a3a3c;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;';ov.appendChild(btn);var h=document.createElement('p');h.textContent=srcs.length+' image link'+(srcs.length!==1?'s':'')+' found:';h.style.cssText='color:#8e8e93;font-size:13px;margin:0 0 8px;';ov.appendChild(h);if(srcs.length===0){var p=document.createElement('p');p.textContent='No images found on this page.';p.style.cssText='color:#fff;font-size:14px;';ov.appendChild(p);}else{srcs.forEach(function(src){var p=document.createElement('p');p.textContent=src;p.style.cssText='margin:4px 0;word-break:break-all;font-size:11px;color:#64d2ff;font-family:monospace;';ov.appendChild(p);});}document.documentElement.appendChild(ov);})();
